$comment: Rendered typography contract enforced by scripts/font-audit-eval.mjs against the working/font-audit sweep; the state manifest lives in font-audit-states.mjs (shared with the sweep). Ceilings are ratchets pinned to the 2026-07-17 post-consolidation result (29 variants, from a 55-variant baseline) — lower them as further consolidation lands, never raise them to bless drift. The PRD's aspirational ceiling is 25; the gap to 29 is enumerated in planning/archive/dated/2026-07-17/typography-consolidation/STATUS.md. Role budgets count distinct site-wide variants participating in each inferred role (modal/ prefix stripped); 'button' includes every text node inside clickable cards/rows/pills, not just the shared button tiers.
